categories.title: MADE OF KERATIN
categories.theme: Questions about animal features or structures whose answer connects to the protein keratin, or questions about what animal body parts are made of

clues.clue: Snakes and most lizards have scales made of this tough structural protein.
clues.fit_justification: Source question asks 'What are the scales on all snakes and most lizards made of?' and source answer is 'Keratin'.

clues.clue: A rhino's iconic horn is composed of this same fibrous protein found in human fingernails.
clues.fit_justification: Source question asks 'What are rhino's horn made of?' and source answer is 'Keratin'.

clues.clue: The green pigment that gives plant leaves their colour.
clues.fit_justification: Source question asks 'What produces the green colour of most plant leaves?' and source answer is 'Chlorophyll', a natural biological compound directly relevant to plant science.

clues.clue: This luxury wool, prized in fashion, comes from a four-legged farm animal with horns.
clues.fit_justification: Source question asks 'Cashmere is the wool from which kind of animal?' and source answer is 'Goat'.

clues.clue: The copper-rich protein responsible for the blue blood found in the Antarctic octopus.
clues.fit_justification: Source question asks 'What is the name of the copper-rich protein that creates the blue blood in the Antarctic octopus?' and source answer is 'Hemocyanin'.

categories.title: SCIENTIFIC NAMES

finals.title: ANIMAL TAXONOMY
